sglang.title: [Fix] Release hierarchical cache host pool on graceful shutdown
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

A plain HiRadixCache (no hisparse) never unregisters its large cudaHostRegister'd host KV pool on shutdown.
Under a SIGKILL teardown the kernel unpins that pool during reclaim, stalling the scheduler in uninterruptible sleep for tens of seconds while it keeps holding GPU memory.
This trips

vllm.author: aoshen02
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
… stripping
Fixes #44319
SentencePiece's decode() strips the leading space from the first token (add_dummy_prefix inverse), causing distinct tokens like "▁true" (id=1565) and "true" (id=3009) to both decode to "true". When the Legacy Completions API builds top_logprobs as dict[str, float], these col
